title: Senior Plant Manager at EPC Industrie

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at EPC Industrie
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? EPC Industrie in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About EPC Industrie:
EPC Industrie is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie!
